Bash(sqlite3 "/Users/robertfan/Claude Code/fulfillment-app/backend/fulfillment.db" "SELECT shopify_sku, COUNT\(*\) as hour_buckets_with_sales, SUM\(quantity_sold\) as total_qty, SUM\(order_count\) as total_orders FROM historical_sales WHERE shopify_sku LIKE 'f.cherry-plum%' AND hour_bucket >= '2026-03-27' AND hour_bucket <= '2026-04-24' GROUP BY shopify_sku;")

Bash(sqlite3 "/Users/robertfan/Claude Code/fulfillment-app/backend/fulfillment.db" "WITH h AS \(SELECT shopify_sku, CAST\(strftime\('%w', hour_bucket\) AS INT\) AS dow, CAST\(strftime\('%H', hour_bucket\) AS INT\) AS hour, quantity_sold FROM historical_sales WHERE shopify_sku LIKE 'f.cherry-plum%' AND hour_bucket >= '2026-03-27' AND hour_bucket <= '2026-04-24'\), agg AS \(SELECT shopify_sku, dow, hour, AVG\(CAST\(quantity_sold AS FLOAT\)\) AS avg_qty, COUNT\(*\) AS n_weeks, SUM\(quantity_sold\) AS total_qty FROM h GROUP BY shopify_sku, dow, hour\) SELECT shopify_sku, COUNT\(*\) AS unique_slots, SUM\(avg_qty\) AS projected_weekly, SUM\(total_qty\) AS total_hist FROM agg GROUP BY shopify_sku;")

Bash(sqlite3 "/Users/robertfan/Claude Code/fulfillment-app/backend/fulfillment.db" "WITH h AS \(SELECT shopify_sku, CAST\(strftime\('%w', hour_bucket\) AS INT\) AS dow, CAST\(strftime\('%H', hour_bucket\) AS INT\) AS hour, quantity_sold, order_count FROM historical_sales WHERE shopify_sku LIKE 'f.cherry-plum%' AND hour_bucket >= '2026-03-27' AND hour_bucket <= '2026-04-24'\), agg AS \(SELECT shopify_sku, dow, hour, AVG\(CAST\(quantity_sold AS FLOAT\)\) AS avg_qty, AVG\(CAST\(order_count AS FLOAT\)\) AS avg_orders FROM h GROUP BY shopify_sku, dow, hour\), slots AS \(SELECT 5 AS dow, 8 AS hour UNION SELECT 5,9 UNION SELECT 5,10 UNION SELECT 5,11 UNION SELECT 5,12 UNION SELECT 5,13 UNION SELECT 5,14 UNION SELECT 5,15 UNION SELECT 5,16 UNION SELECT 5,17 UNION SELECT 5,18 UNION SELECT 5,19 UNION SELECT 5,20 UNION SELECT 5,21 UNION SELECT 5,22 UNION SELECT 5,23\) SELECT 'Fri_only', SUM\(avg_qty\) FROM agg JOIN slots USING\(dow,hour\);")
